title: Assessment of Safety, Tolerability, and Efficacy of Donanemab in Early Symptomatic Alzheimer's Disease
brief_title: A Study of Donanemab (LY3002813) in Participants With Early Alzheimer's Disease (TRAILBLAZER-ALZ 2)
note: primary_outcomes list omitted here (verbose); registered PRIMARY iADRS result values (overall trial population, from resultsSection, already cached in NCT04437511.json via external.py's REST fetch): Donanemab -10.19, Placebo -13.11 (Change from Baseline iADRS, Overall Population). jes26's ARA claims (C01) are computed on the EU-eligible POST-HOC SUBGROUP (-10.6/-13.0), not the full trial population registered as primary -- close in magnitude/direction but not the same population.
